CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-29-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-31-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-21-2012 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING [PURSUANT TO CCP 36(B)]IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF DIRECTED THE COURT'S ATTENTION TO DEFENDANT'S CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT, PARAGRAPH 6, WHICH INDICATED THAT DEFENDANT WAS AWARE OF TODAY'S HEARING. PLAINTIFF ALSO REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF WILL NOT BE AMENDING THE COMPLAINT TO ADD CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS A PARTY TO THIS CASE. TRIAL BY JURY IS SET FOR 12/10/12 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 206. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for two Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: S.Wong #11228.
Christopher Keane, Esq. for the Petitioner Nick Bryngelson present via Court Call as guardian ad litem for Luke Bryngelson, Minor Claimant.
Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Settlement of $35,000.00, attorney fee $7,616.03, reimbursment of medical expenses $2,197.44 and Costs $4,535.88
A net balance of $19,335.31 for each minor to be placed in a Trust Account until Minor's reaches the age of 22 years. (Trust ID #011200117 Federal Tax ID #46-6358043)
Counsel to submit a revised proposed Order approving Minor's Compromise to court this afternoon for signature.
Order was submitted and signed (see scanned doc. for details of order).
Status Hearing was set on 03-12-13 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for filing the receipt for the deposit of money into TRUST ACCOUNT. No appearance is required if the receipt was filed and copy lodged with Dept. 514.
